title: 'achowth #0269
definition:
1) sister
   1a) sister (same parents)
   1b) half-sister (same father)
   1c) relative
       1c1) (metaph) of Israel's and Judah"s relationship
   1d) beloved
       1d1) bride
   1e) (fig.) of intimate connection
   1f) another
